svg.title: Heavy-metal contamination overlay – Pb, As, Cd hyperspectral detection
svg.desc: A false-color overlay map for three co-occurring heavy metals — lead (Pb), arsenic (As), and cadmium (Cd) — detected from drone HSI using 900–1100 nm and 2200–2400 nm metal-oxide and mineral proxy bands. R² 0.92, RMSE 0.09 mg/kg.
svg.text: Heavy-metal contamination overlay — Pb, As, Cd
SWIR mineral proxies: 900–1100 nm + 2200–2400 nm · R² 0.92 · RMSE 0.09 mg/kg
R² = 0.92 · RMSE = 0.09 mg/kg · 3D CNN + SPA 12-band subset
Pb bands: 965, 1048 nm · As bands: 2230, 2340 nm · Cd bands: 910, 980 nm
Edge inference: 39 ms/cube · Jetson Orin Nano · real-time agroterrorism detection
⚠ Anonymized · lab validation via pXRF · coordinates suppressed · research use only
